qa_pairs.question: My sponsored Alliance account role is still deactivated after I completed the renewal process. Why is this happening, and how can I reactivate it?
qa_pairs.answer: Your sponsored role will be activated once your sponsor renews their own account and confirms that your role is continuing. If your role remains deactivated after you have renewed, it is likely due to your sponsor not yet having completed their renewal and confirmation process. Your role should activate as soon as they do so.

qa_pairs.question: I made a mistake and renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role. How can I correct this error and renew my account with the proper role?
qa_pairs.answer: To correct this mistake, you should create a new role with your current information. Log into CCDB and from the main menu, navigate to 'My Account' and select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions to select your new role. Your sponsor will receive an email with a link to confirm this new role. Your old role will automatically expire and be deactivated if it is not renewed.
